fields.summary: Database observability agent crashing on high cardinality metrics
fields.description: The DB-O11y agent crashes when encountering tables with >1000 unique column names. Memory usage spikes to 4GB before OOM kill. Affects customer deployments in AWS RDS.

fields.summary: MSSQL integration fails SSL handshake with Azure SQL
fields.description: After upgrading to v3.2, MSSQL integration cannot connect to Azure SQL databases using SSL. Error: 'x509: certificate signed by unknown authority'. Works fine with on-prem SQL Server.

fields.summary: PostgreSQL slow query monitoring missing bind parameters
fields.description: The nri-postgresql integration captures slow queries but strips out bind parameters, making debugging impossible. Query shows `SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = $1` instead of actual ID value.

fields.summary: Oracle integration connection pool leak on network failures
fields.description: When Oracle database becomes temporarily unreachable, the integration doesn't release connections properly. Pool grows from 10 to 500+ connections over 24 hours, eventually exhausting file descriptors.

fields.summary: MongoDB integration incorrectly reports replica set lag
fields.description: The nri-mongodb integration reports replication lag in milliseconds but the MongoDB oplog timestamp is in seconds. This causes false alerts showing 1000x higher lag than actual. Discovered during customer escalation.
